/// Production Automated Incident Response.
/// Executes pre-defined playbooks upon security alerts.

use fusion_std::error::{StdResult, StdError};
use fusion_net::tcp::FusionTcpStream;

pub struct IncidentPlaybook;

impl IncidentPlaybook {
    /// Executes a contained response action.
    pub async fn execute_quarantine(&self, ip_address: &str) -> StdResult<()> {
        // In production: Interface with fusion_sec_network_segmentation or K8s NetworkPolicy API.
        
        println!("[Incident] Alert received for IP: {}. Executing network quarantine playbook.", ip_address);
        
        // Simulate block execution (e.g., modifying firewall rule via SSH/API)
        tokio::time::sleep(std::time::Duration::from_millis(50)).await;
        
        Ok(())
    }
}
